# Talk to My Lawyer

> Attorney-drafted legal letters for individuals and small businesses in California. Flat-fee, attorney-reviewed, delivered in minutes. Your first letter is free.

## Core pages
- [Pricing](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/pricing): Plans and costs.
- [FAQ](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/faq): Common questions.
- [Services overview](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services): All letter types.
- [Document analyzer](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/analyze): Free legal document analysis.

## Letter services
- [Demand letter](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/demand-letter)
- [Cease and desist](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/cease-and-desist)
- [Breach of contract](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/breach-of-contract-letter)
- [Security deposit](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/security-deposit-letter)
- [Employment dispute](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/employment-dispute-letter)
- [Personal injury demand](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/personal-injury-demand-letter)
- [Landlord harassment](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/landlord-harassment-cease-desist)
- [Non-compete dispute](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/non-compete-dispute-letter)
- [IP infringement](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/intellectual-property-infringement-letter)
- [Small claims demand](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/services/small-claims-demand-letter)

- [Amazon sellers stopping counterfeits with a legal letter](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/blog/amazon-sellers-stop-counterfeit-listings-legal-letter)
- [What is an IP infringement letter](https://talk-to-my-lawyer.com/blog/what-is-an-intellectual-property-infringement-letter)
